body:
If you’re a real estate agency looking to establish a professional online presence, our tailored Wix Studio template is the perfect solution. Designed specifically for agencies specializing in property rentals and sales, this template combines modern aesthetics, powerful functionality, and SEO optimization to help your business thrive in the competitive real estate market.

Why Choose This Template?

1. Clear Module Separation

This template features dedicated modules for property rental and sales, ensuring that your clients can easily find the information they’re looking for. Whether they’re searching for a cozy rental or their dream home, the intuitive design streamlines their browsing experience.

2. Responsive Across All Devices

Built with Wix Studio’s advanced responsive design tools, this template ensures your website looks stunning and functions flawlessly on desktops, tablets, and smartphones. Provide your audience with a seamless browsing experience, no matter where they are.

3. SEO-Friendly Design

Achieving online visibility is crucial for real estate businesses. This template includes built-in SEO optimization features, such as:

  • Structured URLs
  • Optimized page titles and meta descriptions
  • Fast-loading pages
  • Schema Markup to highlight property details

These features ensure your website ranks higher in search engine results, attracting more organic traffic.

4. Comprehensive Page Structure

The template comes with all the essential pages your agency needs:

  • Home: A welcoming homepage to introduce your services.
  • Rent: A dedicated section for showcasing rental properties.
  • Buy: A space for listing properties for sale.
  • Blog: Share market insights, tips, and updates to engage your audience and boost SEO.
  • About: Build trust by sharing your company’s story and values.
  • Contact: Make it easy for potential clients to reach out to you.

5. Customizable and User-Friendly

With Wix Studio’s intuitive editing tools, you can quickly personalize the design to reflect your brand’s identity. No coding skills are required—just drag, drop, and adjust to create a professional, unique website.

6. Optimized Property Display

The template includes powerful property filtering and search functionality, helping visitors quickly find the listings that meet their needs. Showcase your properties with high-quality images and detailed descriptions to leave a lasting impression.

Who Is This Template For?

This template is ideal for:

  • Real estate agencies
  • Property managers
  • Realtors looking to expand their online presence

Final Thoughts

Creating a professional, user-friendly, and SEO-optimized website doesn’t have to be complicated. With this Wix Studio template, you can focus on what you do best—helping your clients find their perfect property—while your website works tirelessly to attract and engage potential customers.

Ready to elevate your real estate business? Explore this template today and build a website that truly stands out!

title: Discover the Perfect Wix Studio Template for Real Estate Agencies

body:
Give your store the power to stand out with richer, smarter, and more compelling product presentations.

In today’s competitive eCommerce landscape, your product detail page is no longer just an information section—it’s where your brand convinces customers to buy.

Yet most store templates still limit you to basic images and plain text, making it hard to showcase your products with depth and creativity.

To help merchants build more professional, highly engaging, and conversion-driven product pages, we created Zider Product Detail—a powerful content enhancement plugin designed to elevate the way you present your products.

Zider Product Details

🌟 Why Every Store Needs Zider Product Detail

Modern shoppers expect more than a few images and a short description.

They want deeper insights, richer visuals, and a more immersive shopping experience.

Zider Product Detail delivers exactly that.

🎨 1. Flexible Styling Options

Customize layouts, typography, and content blocks to perfectly match your brand’s identity—no coding required.

✔ Adjustable layout modules

✔ Customizable text styling

✔ Consistent branding and visual language

🖼️ 2. Rich Media Support

Bring your product stories to life with diverse media formats.

Go beyond static images and add richer content elements:

📌 Image galleries

📌 Embedded videos

📌 External links

📌 Tables & comparison charts

📌 Lists, icons, structured content blocks

More expressive content → better user understanding → higher conversions.

🔗 3. Seamless Product Integration

Effortlessly integrates with your existing product pages for a smooth, intuitive editing experience.

✔ No coding setup

✔ Fully compatible with your store structure

✔ Mobile-friendly and auto-responsive

Just select a product and start enhancing—it’s that simple.

✏️ 4. Easy Content Updates

Update your product descriptions anytime without hiring a designer or developer.

Instantly replace images, edit text, or add new structured sections using a clean, intuitive editor.

✔ Quick edits

✔ Unlimited updates

✔ Perfect for brands that continuously optimize content

💡 What Can You Build with Zider Product Detail?

You can easily create professional-grade content like:

  • Detailed specification tables

  • Clear product comparison charts

  • Video demos and tutorials

  • Long-form image-rich descriptions

  • FAQs and usage guides

  • Download links or external resources

Everything you need to present your product with clarity, depth, and impact.

🛍️ How Zider Helps Boost Conversions

Shoppers make decisions based on three key questions:

  1. Is this product good?

    → Rich media builds stronger proof

  2. Can I trust this brand?

    → Professional layouts increase credibility

  3. Can I quickly find what I need?

    → Structured content makes information clear and easy to consume

The more informative and polished your product pages are, the easier it is for customers to say “yes.”

🚀 Elevate Your Product Pages Today

Zider Product Detail is the simplest, most effective way to enhance your store’s content depth, visual appeal, and conversion rates.

If you’re looking for a tool that is:

✔ More flexible

✔ More expressive

✔ Easier to use

✔ More conversion-driven

Then Zider Product Detail is built for you.

In today’s hyper-competitive eCommerce world, a product page is far more than a place to list basic information. It’s where your brand communicates value, builds trust, and ultimately convinces shoppers to click “Buy.”

Yet many online stores are still stuck with limited templates, static layouts, and generic content sections that fail to fully showcase the product’s strengths.

This is exactly why we created Zider Product Details — a powerful Wix plugin designed to help merchants elevate their product pages with richer content, flexible layouts, and brand-level presentation.

🌟 Why Zider Product Details Is a Game-Changer

Modern shoppers want more than a few images and a short description.

They expect detailed information, visually engaging content, and a truly immersive product experience.

Zider Product Details gives you the tools to deliver just that.

🎨 Flexible Styling for a Stronger Brand Identity

Your product pages should feel like an extension of your brand — clean, polished, and visually consistent.

With Zider Product Details, you can:

  • Customize layouts with no coding

Whether you’re launching a new brand or upgrading an existing one, the plugin gives you full creative freedom.

The more confident shoppers feel, the faster they buy.

🚀 Upgrade Your Product Pages Today

Zider Product Details is the simplest and most effective way to enhance your Wix store with professional, high-impact product content.

If you’re looking for a tool that is:

✔ More flexible

✔ More expressive

✔ Easier to use

✔ Proven to improve conversions

Then Zider Product Details is the plugin your store needs.

Transform the way you present your products — and start converting more visitors into customer

body:
In e-commerce, "more data" isn’t always better. If your current integration blindly pushes every single order from Wix to your shipping platform, you aren’t automating—you’re creating a bottleneck.

For stores selling a mix of products or using multiple fulfillment methods, a "sync-all" approach leads to cluttered shipping queues, warehouse confusion, and manual cleanup tasks.

Our Wix Velo-powered Zenstores Integration changes the game by introducing Item-Level Sync Control. Finally, you can decide exactly what gets shipped, and how.

1. The Hybrid Challenge: Only Sync What’s Physical

Not every "order" is a box waiting to be packed. If you sell:

  • Digital downloads or online courses

  • Service deposits or memberships

  • In-store pickup tickets

Traditional sync tools treat these like physical goods, clogging your Zenstores dashboard with "ghost" orders. Our solution allows you to toggle sync settings at the product level. Keep your shipping list clean, actionable, and focused 100% on items that actually need a label.

2. Multi-Channel Intelligence: Routed Fulfillment

Scaling businesses often use a mix of logistics: some products stay in your own warehouse, while others are handled by dropshippers or 3PLs.

With our integration, you define the rules. Only the SKUs handled by your internal team are pushed to Zenstores. Dropship items remain in Wix for separate management, eliminating double-shipping errors and preventing expensive shipping rate miscalculations.

3. The "Closed-Loop" Automation: Real-Time Tracking Write-Back

Efficiency shouldn't stop at the warehouse door. Our integration creates a seamless information loop:

  • Auto-Update: As soon as a label is created in Zenstores, the tracking number is instantly written back to the Wix order.

  • Status Sync: The Wix order status flips to "Fulfilled" automatically.

  • Customer Delight: Your customers receive their tracking emails immediately, reducing "Where is my order?" inquiries by up to 40%.

Why This is Different:

  • Granular Control: No more "all or nothing." Sync by SKU or product type.

  • Built on Wix Velo: A native-level integration that is secure, stable, and won't slow down your storefront.

  • Tailored Logic: We adapt the tool to your business workflow—not the other way around.

Stop fighting your tools and start mastering your logistics.

Contact Now

Add a drag-to-compare slider to your Wix site. Show the difference between "before" and "after" in seconds.

What problem it solves:

Regular images can't show transformation interactively. This plugin lets you upload two images, and visitors just drag to see the change.

Perfect for:

  • Skincare & beauty brands (before vs after use)

  • E-commerce products (standard vs upgrade)

  • Anyone who needs to prove results visually

Why use it:

  • One-click install – works inside Wix Editor

  • No coding – just upload two images

  • Mobile friendly – smooth touch drag

  • Free to use – core features are free

What users say:

"Swiping on my phone feels super smooth." – ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

Get started:

body:
BeforeAfter Slider X overview

  • Add Sliders
  • Customize Divider
  • Label & Watermark

BeforeAfter Slider X is a powerful and easy-to-use widget for showcasing before-and-after images on your site. Perfect for portfolios, product demos, and visual comparisons, it features customizable divider styles, smooth label animations, and watermark control. Enhance your site’s interactivity and engage visitors with a professional, responsive slider. Premium users enjoy advanced customization and watermark-free display.

You have multiple before-and-after images on your Wix site.

One slider shows a kitchen renovation. You want labels that say "Old / New."

Another slider shows a skincare result. You want "Day 1 / Week 4."

A third slider shows a fitness transformation. You want "Start / Finish."

Most Wix plugins force you to use the same label on every slider.

Not BeforeAfter Slider X.

With this plugin, you can set different labels for each individual slider. Custom text. Any wording you want. No workarounds. No coding.

Just type what each slider needs.

Other features you'll love:

  • Customize divider style, color, and width

  • Smooth label animations

  • Watermark control (remove it with Premium plan)

  • Fully responsive on mobile

  • Free plan available

Built for Wix

One-click install. Works inside Wix Editor. No coding required.

Ready to solve your label problem?

body:
If you want to show a clear visual difference on a Wix website, a before and after slider is one of the easiest ways to do it.

Instead of placing two images separately and hoping visitors notice the difference, you can let them drag a slider and compare both versions directly. This makes the result faster to understand and often more convincing.

A before and after slider can be useful for many types of Wix websites, including:

  • website redesigns

  • renovation and interior projects

  • beauty and skincare results

  • photo editing and retouching

  • cleaning and repair services

  • design portfolios

  • product transformation or upgrade showcases

For businesses that rely on visual proof, this type of comparison block can make case studies and service pages much stronger.

What is the best Wix before and after slider?

The best option is usually the one that is simple to install, easy to use, and clear for visitors.

For many Wix users, a practical choice is Before And After, a Wix app designed to help you add a draggable image comparison slider to your website.

With this kind of tool, visitors can move the slider and instantly see the difference between the “before” and “after” image in a single section. That is often more effective than showing two static images side by side.

You can check it here:

Before And After

https://www.wix.com/app-market/before-and-after?referral=zider.ink

Where is the before and after slider on Wix?

Many users search for a built-in before and after slider inside the Wix editor, but in many cases, the easiest solution is to install one from the Wix App Market.

That means if you are wondering where to find a before and after slider on Wix, the answer is usually:

go to the Wix App Market and look for a dedicated image comparison app.

Using an app is often the fastest way to add this feature without writing custom code or building the interaction manually.

Is there a good before and after slider app for Wix?

Yes. If your goal is to show visual comparisons clearly, a dedicated Wix app is usually the simplest solution.

A good before and after slider app for Wix should help you:

  • add the comparison section quickly

  • upload two images easily

  • create a clean drag interaction

  • display results clearly on your page

Before And After is a straightforward option for this. It is useful for agencies, designers, service businesses, and anyone who wants to present “before vs after” results in a more interactive way.

App link:

https://www.wix.com/app-market/before-and-after?referral=zider.ink

How do you create a before and after slider in Wix?

The easiest way to create a before and after slider in Wix is to use an app from the Wix App Market.

The basic process is simple:

  1. Install a before and after slider app

  2. Add it to the page where you want the comparison to appear

  3. Upload your before image

  4. Upload your after image

  5. Adjust the layout if needed

  6. Publish and test the slider on your live page

This is usually much faster than building a custom solution yourself.

If you want a simple option to start with, you can try:

Before And After

https://www.wix.com/app-market/before-and-after?referral=zider.ink

Why use a before and after slider on a Wix site?

A before and after slider helps visitors understand your value faster.

When people visit a service website, they often want proof. They want to see what changed. They want to compare the result. A slider makes that easy.

For example:

  • a redesign agency can show the old homepage and the new homepage

  • a renovation company can show the room before and after the project

  • a retouching service can show the original photo and the edited result

  • a cleaning business can show the space before and after service

This kind of visual comparison can make your website feel more direct, more trustworthy, and easier to understand.

Final thoughts

If your Wix website depends on visual results, adding a before and after slider is a simple improvement that can make your pages more effective.

It helps visitors compare changes instantly and makes your work easier to explain.

If you are looking for a simple tool to do that on Wix, Before And After is worth a look:

https://www.wix.com/app-market/before-and-after?referral=zider.ink
